title: koeleria gracilis var. convoluta
intro: Koeleria gracilis var. convoluta, also known as convoluted blue grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, Koeleria gracilis var. convoluta has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Koeleria gracilis var. convoluta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible herbal remedy.
